items.title: Chase Ultimate Rewards offering 55% transfer bonus to Marriott
items.summary: On May 1, Chase launched a 65% transfer bonus to Marriott Bonvoy, meaning you’d get 1.65 Bonvoy points for every Ultimate Reward point that you transfer until May 15th.
